name: Falco 61.5" Floor Lamp - FLL4118 - Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant Falco 61.5 inch gold iron floor lamp. This stunning piece adds a touch of sophistication to any room with its minimalist design and radiant gold finish. Crafted from sturdy iron, the lamp not only provides ample lighting but also serves as a striking decorative element that complements a variety of interiors. Perfect for creating a cozy reading nook or accentuating a stylish living area, the Falco lamp blends functionality with modern flair. Its tall, sleek frame is ideal for bringing warmth and ambience into your home, making it an irresistible addition to your decor.
